g.text: Singapore viewing dates: Fri 12 Jun to Mon 20 Jul | Final: Mon 20 Jul, 03:00 SGT

Source base: FIFA World Cup 2026 official match schedule PDF, updated 10 Apr 2026. Kickoffs converted to Singapore Time (ET +12 / BST +7 during Jun-Jul 2026).
Subject to change. W = winner, L = loser, 1A = Group A winner, 2B = Group B runner-up, 3 A/B/C/D/F = one of the best third-placed teams from those groups.
